blocks.label: Path
blocks.text:
Born in the UK, I grew up between Switzerland and Turkey, giving me a global perspective and fluency in English, Turkish, and German.

I'm currently studying Business & Management at Royal Holloway, alongside building experience across Amazon, Spotify, and now Microsoft.

blocks.label: Now
blocks.text:
Right now I'm interning at Intel, and I'll be joining Microsoft's MSAI team as a Product Manager Intern this summer.

I'm especially interested in AI-native products, experimentation, and how new tools are changing the way we build.

blocks.label: In my free time
blocks.text: I'm usually hiking, climbing, taking photos, or traveling to cool new spots.

timeline.description: Working on AI-driven products in the MSAI team
Worked on strategic growth for merchants.
Worked on improving carrier rail compliance.
Worked on AI features for users.
